On 21/07/2010 21:42, Marcus von Appen wrote:
> Hi Aldis,
> 
> is there any timeline for the FreeBSD port of texlive? If not, I'd like
> to delay this by a week and a half or so, since I won't be around for a
> week starting at Saturday and thus have no possibility to take care of
> it.
> I'll do the renaming and such afterwards then.
> 
> Best regards
> Marcus

No there is no timeline...

P.S.
Sorry for waiting my reply so long. I was in Russia, wasn't able to reply.
